summary: Nightly memory consolidation: review today’s key learnings, preferences, decisions, and outstanding follow-ups. Update MEMORY.md (long-term stable facts) and memory/2026-02-28.md equivalent daily note with concise bullets. Do not invent facts. If no meaningful new learnings, reply NO_REPLY.
